title: OREGON RX CARD - 211info
text: OREGON RX CARD OREGON RX CARD Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Prescription assistance program that provides savings of up to 80% on generic and brand medications. The program is accepted at Safeway, BI-MART, CVS, Fred Meyer, Rite Aid, Walgreens, and Walmart. Website Eligibility: Uninsured and underinsured individuals. Those with insurance, including Medicare Part D, can also utilize the program for medications not covered by their plans. Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Visit Website INTAKE PROCEDURE: No application necessary. Visit website to download, print, or save a free pre-activated card to your phone, research drug pricing, and locate local participating pharmacies There is no enrollment process, the program is completely confidential, and the cards do not expire. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Prescription Drug Discount Cards If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
